Hoping for a Venezuela but getting a North Korea instead…


Adam Cancryn (@adamcancryn)

Trump was specifically cautioned that the “most likely”outcome of killing Khamenei was that he would be replaced by another similarly hardline leader.
But officials still went into the strikes hoping they’d ultimately result in a friendlier face atop Iran
cnn.com/2026/03/14/politics/…

If they’re “beaten and completely decimated” then why are they still in power and able to control the Strait?


Trump War Room (@TrumpWarRoom)







— https://nitter.net/TrumpWarRoom/status/2032894815910703387#m

Heard from one of my relatives in Tehran for the first time since the war began two weeks ago… 

“I barely managed to connect. We’re good. Don’t worry.”
